dms_hostname.label: 邮件服务器 hostname
dms_hostname.help: 邮件服务器 FQDN。**这是 MX 记录指向的主机名**——必须有 A 记录 + 反向 DNS（PTR）匹配。VPS 控制台改 PTR：很多大厂（DigitalOcean / Linode / Vultr）面板里直接改；AWS 要发工单。
dms_hostname.helpEn: Mail server FQDN. **MX record points here**. Must have matching A and PTR (reverse DNS) records. PTR is changed via VPS console (DO/Linode/Vultr easy; AWS requires support ticket).

dms_domain.label: 邮件域
dms_domain.help: 邮箱地址 @ 后面的部分。例：user@example.com → mail_domain=example.com。MX 记录加在此域上指向 hostname。
dms_domain.helpEn: Domain after @ in email addresses. Example: user@example.com → mail_domain=example.com. MX record on this domain points to hostname.

dms_postmaster_email.label: Postmaster 邮箱
dms_postmaster_email.help: DMARC report 发到这里。RFC 要求每个邮件域必须有 postmaster@ 别名。Playbook **不会自动创建**——记得手动加：docker exec -it mailserver setup email add postmaster@example.com
dms_postmaster_email.helpEn: DMARC reports go here. RFC requires postmaster@ alias for each mail domain. Playbook does NOT auto-create—add manually: docker exec -it mailserver setup email add postmaster@example.com

dms_data_dir.label: 数据目录
dms_data_dir.help: 存所有邮件 + 配置 + 日志。**每日备份此目录**——丢了 = 所有邮件 + DKIM key 重来。Maildir 格式（每邮件一文件，备份友好）。
dms_data_dir.helpEn: Stores all mail + config + logs. **Back up daily**—loss = all mail + DKIM keys gone. Maildir format (one file per mail, backup friendly).

dms_enable_clamav.label: 启用 ClamAV 病毒扫描
dms_enable_clamav.help: true = 病毒扫附件。**吃 1 GB+ RAM** + 首次启动慢（下载病毒库）。**家庭 / VPS 一般关闭**——Rspamd 已检查附件 hash。
dms_enable_clamav.helpEn: true = scan attachments. **Eats 1 GB+ RAM**, slow first start (downloads virus DB). Usually disabled for home/VPS—Rspamd already checks attachment hashes.

dms_enable_fail2ban.label: 启用 Fail2Ban
dms_enable_fail2ban.help: true（推荐）= 自动封反复登录失败的 IP（暴力破解 SMTP / IMAP 密码）。
dms_enable_fail2ban.helpEn: true (recommended) = auto-ban IPs with repeated SMTP/IMAP login failures.

dms_log_level.label: 日志级别
dms_log_level.help: trace / debug 仅排错时短期开（日志爆炸）。
dms_log_level.helpEn: Use trace/debug only for short troubleshooting (log explosion).
